channel.name: paint_defect_reduction
channel.header: Discussions and updates on the reduction of paint defects
channel.purpose: Share information and progress on reducing paint defects

channel.name: vehicle_compliance
channel.header: Discussing compliance with North American standards
channel.purpose: Ensure our vehicles comply with North American regulations

post.message: Team, I'm happy to share some great news from our Q1 2025 report. We've made significant progress in reducing paint defects at our Austin, Texas facility.

After implementing the updated spray booth calibration protocol, we've seen a reduction in paint defects by 43%. This is a substantial improvement, and I want to thank everyone involved in the process.
That's excellent news, Ethan! It's great to see the impact of our continuous efforts on improving the quality of our vehicles. Let's keep up the momentum.
Just a heads up everyone, we'll have a team meeting next Wednesday to discuss our overall progress. Please prepare your updates.
The new EV model passed all initial compliance tests. Good job team!
Ethan, do we have updates on the new paint drying equipment? The supplier was supposed to get back to us last week.
We're scheduled to attend the North American EV Compliance Conference next month. Please check your calendars.
Jane, I'm still waiting for the supplier's response. I'll follow-up with them again today.
Great news about the compliance tests. Let's ensure we maintain this standard in future models too.
Thanks, Ethan. We need those equipment updates to ensure our processes are running smoothly.
